summary: Frontend testing completed for CAIWAVE Campaign/Ads Display features. All 7 features tested and verified working correctly: Quick stats (Live Now, Pending, Today, Ended), Filter tabs (Pending, Approved, Paid, Live, Ended, Today, Yesterday, Rejected), Ad cards with image thumbnails, status badges, Go-Live/End dates, and CAIWAVE TV WhatsApp contact button.
passed_tests: ✅ Admin Ad Management page shows quick stats: Live Now (3), Pending (1), Today (1), Ended (1)
✅ Admin Ad Management page has filter tabs: Pending, Approved, Paid, Live, Ended, Today, Yesterday, Rejected
✅ Ad cards display image thumbnails prominently at top of card
✅ Ad cards show status badges: Pending (⏳), Approved (✓), Paid (💳), Live (🟢), Ended (⏹️)
✅ Ad cards show Go-Live Date and End Date fields with formatted dates
✅ Landing page CAIWAVE TV section shows 'Want to broadcast your event on CAIWAVE TV?' text
✅ Landing page Contact CAIWAVE button is green (bg-green-600) and redirects to https://wa.me/254738570630
✅ Live ads show views and clicks statistics
✅ Live ads have Suspend button for admin control
✅ Package-Based Ad Flow visualization displayed (Pending → Approved → Paid → Live → Ended)
critical_code_review_comments: Ad Management UI is well-implemented with comprehensive status tracking
Date formatting is consistent and user-friendly (DD MMM YYYY, HH:MM format)
Status badges use appropriate colors and emojis for quick visual identification
WhatsApp integration uses correct link format (wa.me/phone_number)
seed_data_creation: Test data already seeded with 5 ads: 1 pending, 3 live (with different dates), 1 ended
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Campaign/Ads Display features are working correctly. The Ad Management page shows quick stats (Live Now, Pending, Today, Ended), has all filter tabs (Pending, Approved, Paid, Live, Ended, Today, Yesterday, Rejected), displays ad cards with image thumbnails, status badges, and Go-Live/End dates. The CAIWAVE TV section on landing page has the WhatsApp contact button working correctly.

ad_card_elements.image_thumbnail: Displayed prominently at top of card
ad_card_elements.go_live_date: Formatted as DD MMM YYYY, HH:MM
ad_card_elements.end_date: Formatted as DD MMM YYYY, HH:MM

caiwave_tv_section.text: Want to broadcast your event on CAIWAVE TV?
